'''Lej Carner''' was the son of an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Major General]] on [[Garos IV]]. He was killed by [[Chanceller]], a resistance fighter and contemporary of his romantic interest, [[Alexandra Winger]].

==Biography==
Lej Carner was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] whose [[Carner|father]] was a [[Major General]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. When his father was assigned to run the [[Imperial mining center complex]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garos IV]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], Carner followed. He was enrolled in the [[University of Garos]], and had several classes with [[Alexandra Winger]], the [[Governor/Legends|Governor's]] daughter, and showed a level of romantic interest in her. Winger cultivated a friendship with Carner, but not to return his affection; she was a member of the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garosian Underground]] and hoped to learn about his father's operations. Unfortunately for her, he had no knowledge that was useful to her. He was due to attend the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] at the end of his studies in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].<ref name="GH" />

During a visit by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Judicator/Legends|''Judicator'']] to the planet, Carner witnessed Winger drive her [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] past the entrance to the [[Governor's mansion (Garos IV)|Governor's mansion]] and decided to follow her. He found out that she was part of the underground when she participated in an attack on a convoy attempting to transport [[Hfredium]] ore to the ''Judicator''. Carner attempted to apprehend her, but he was surprised by one of Winger's fellow rebels, a man named [[Chanceller]]. He shot and killed Carner before he could inform anyone of her loyalties. Chanceller disposed of the body by throwing it off the [[Tahika Cliffs]] while Winger hid his landspeeder in a cave.<ref name="GH" />
